title: Hakuba Strikes the Battlefield
description: Pages 10–14 focus on hakuba strikes the battlefield, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Cavendish, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as cavendish's dangerous alter ego emerges while the fight against the executives grows more unstable.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: UWA AAAAA!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: Farewell, Cavendish!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: HAA HAA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...If you were outside in that mess, you'd be dead in an instant- bay.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You dickNad!! If you were gonna let me in, then you should have just done it in the first place!! I nearly shat a brick!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: 'The hell is with you, man!! Is that any way for someone who just got his ass saved to talk?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I was out there because I was covering you!! Now we're even!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Forget it!! The attack is over!! Hurry and let me out!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: EHHH..?!! You just got done demanding to be let in and now you want out?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You just got here, at least hang out a while before you go running off you selfish prick!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Are you running a fucking pub here?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: After you defend, you attack! Seriously, how stupid are you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Fine, see if I ever let you in again!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: If shit hits the fan again, you'd better!! Damn you're stingy!!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: Ah, I forgot about Robin- Senpai....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Phew, I'm so glad()

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: She's okay- Bay!!

dialogue.speaker: Kyros
dialogue.text: Rebecca, I hope you are alright....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: I'm sorry for letting you go off on your own.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Especially when above this place is the "monsters!" Battleground!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: What is she going up for...

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: She's a clever one, that nice Robin!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: I won't let you interfere with the top inner-circle members anymore!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Catapult Funk!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: BARRTER- BILITY...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: RACE!!!

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: So, she was saved by his barrier?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Hehaha Hahahahaha!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: chicken- KUN!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: You're the best!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: She...she wink at me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: I'm not worthy- Bay...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Just now... that wink... was she trying to say, "Well done, chicken-kun. I'll let you be my many servant now, "May"--bay?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: No-No, how shameless!! I'm getting carried away- Bay! Barto- Lemeo,you're being far too greedy-bay!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: I can feel the tension rising-bay!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Caven- dish!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Sorry to disappoint you, GLA- Dius!!

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: You were in the barrier too...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: "Blackium"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: "Biken"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: "Blue..."

dialogue.speaker: Gladius
dialogue.text: Gladius- Sama-!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: "Bar- Rier"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: gyaya AsAAA AAA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: The "bar- Rier" is charging towards us...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: Barto- Lomeo!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Q,

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: Robin- Senpai, your Winks are worth...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: A man putting his life on the line for- Bay...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: Stop, Bartolomeo!! I'm still in here!!!

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: Sorry, cabbage!! But I have a reason for not stopping!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: What the hell is this reason?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: My tension is just way too high~!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: Like I care?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: What the fuck are you even talking about?! Just cut it out already!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: I am

summary: Hakuba Strikes the Battlefield advances the Dressrosa story through Unknown person #1, Cavendish, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
